title: filago gallica var. simplex
intro: Filago gallica var. simplex, also known as the lesser fleabane, is a perennial plant that belongs to the asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Filago gallica var. simplex include its ability to treat wounds, skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Filago gallica var. simplex can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
